name: playwright-test-results
tagline: Queries a DuckDB snapshot of Playwright CI results via SQL/CLI to answer flaky-test, failure-rate, and slow-test questions.
verdict: Concrete, well-documented CI data tool; gh auth token is used legitimately for its own API calls, no unsafe patterns found. Gaps: no version/changelog, gh CLI dependency not declared upfront, no auth-failure guidance, and no stated exclusions.

highlights.summary: No "NOT for" or exclusion text anywhere in description or body.
Covers snapshot staleness (update cmd) and artifact retention limits, but never addresses gh auth failure/unavailability.
gh CLI is invoked (gh auth token, gh api) with no upfront requirements section or availability/auth check.
